data.title: Marini SkinSolutions® NeuroSmooth™ Wins NewBeauty Award for Best Post-Procedure Serum 2026
data.description: A renowned skincare company, Marini SkinSolutions®, based in San Jose, California, disclosed on April 6, 2026, that their product NeuroSmooth™ has been recognized as the Best Post-Procedure Serum of 2026 by NewBeauty Magazine. The publication holds a prominent position in the aesthetic beauty sector.

data.title: Lifeway Foods to Host Retro-Inspired Wellness House in Palm Springs During Festival Weekend
data.description: A company marks its 40-year milestone with a poolside wellness event in Palm Springs, California on April 6, 2026. Lifeway Foods, Inc. (Nasdaq: LWAY), a top U.S. provider, hosted the celebration featuring music by Debbie Gibson and Autograf, festival-inspired menu items, and more.

data.title: LGI Homes Reports March and First Quarter 2026 Home Closings and Announces Date for First Quarter Earnings Conference Call
data.description: On April 6, 2026, in The Woodlands, Texas, LGI Homes, Inc. (NASDAQ: LGIH) reported that they successfully finalized the sale of 451 homes in March 2026, with 9 of these being either currently or previously leased single-family rental homes. In the first quarter of 2026, the company closed a total of 916 homes, including 35 that were currently or previously leased single-family rental homes.

data.title: Town & Country Event Rentals Appoints Michael Persson as Chief Operating Officer
data.description: In Van Nuys, California, Town & Country Event Rentals and its Signature Party Rentals division have appointed Michael Persson as Chief Operating Officer (COO) to enhance the company's leadership team as it grows in various markets. Persson, with over 20 years of experience in event rental operations, asset management, and large-scale service delivery, started his career in California. This move aims to support the company's expansion strategy.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Whitney Daum as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: Whitney Daum has been recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in The Inner Circle for her significant contributions to medical science and infection prevention. The acknowledgment highlights her distinguished career and expertise in the field.

data.title: FCPT Announces New Seven-Year $200 Million Term Loan Facility
data.description: Four Corners Property Trust, a real estate investment trust focused on owning and acquiring net-leased restaurant and retail properties, based in Mill Valley, California, shared news of securing a new $200 million senior unsecured delayed draw term loan facility. The facility, with a seven-year tenor, was established with a consortium of lenders from the company's current credit facility. This move aims to strengthen the Company's financial position and support its ongoing operations and growth strategies.

data.title: Walker & Dunlop Arranges $104.5 Million Construction Financing for Ritz-Carlton Savannah
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, commercial real estate financing company Walker & Dunlop secured a loan amounting to $104.5 million for the Ritz-Carlton Savannah. This loan will be utilized to support the development of a 15-story deluxe hotel located in Savannah, Georgia.

data.title: Data Breach Alert: Edelson Lechtzin LLP Investigates DocketWise Data Breach
data.description: Investigations are underway by Edelson Lechtzin LLP, a renowned national class action law firm, concerning data privacy issues related to the DocketWise data breach. The breach, discovered in October 2025, revealed possible unauthorized access to credentials linked with a significant number of individuals.

data.title: FGI INDUSTRIES ANNOUNCES FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL-YEAR RESULTS CONFERENCE CALL DATE
data.description: FGI Industries Ltd., a prominent global provider of kitchen and bath products, disclosed that they will release their financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full-year 2025 following the market closure on April 6, 2026. The company, traded as FGI on Nasdaq, is based in East Hanover, New Jersey.
